title: Fall of the Mohicans
writer: Alain Baudry, José Luis Martínez Mollá, James Fenimore Cooper
actors: Jack Taylor, Sara Lezana, Daniel Martín
plot: As Alice and Cora Munro attempt to find their father, a British officer in the French and Indian War, they are set upon by French soldiers and their cohorts, Huron tribesmen led by the evil Magua. Fighting to rescue the women are ...
